ddls:
CREATE TABLE "epidemiological_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data collection */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the data is collected */,
  "tests" INTEGER /* Number of tests conducted on the date */,
  "cases" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases on the date */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases on the date */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths on the date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epidemiological_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the county is located */,
  "fips_code" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Two-letter code of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the state */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient who took the test */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the test result was recorded */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the test was conducted */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., PCR, Antigen) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., Positive, Negative, Inconclusive) */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the patient resides */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the patient */,
  "underlying_conditions" TEXT /* Underlying health conditions of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_details" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each confirmed case */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient with the confirmed case */,
  "date_confirmed" TEXT /* Date the case was confirmed */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the case was confirmed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the case (e.g., Active, Recovered, Deceased) */,
  "hospitalization" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient was hospitalized */,
  "hospitalization_date" TEXT /* Date of hospitalization */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the case (e.g., Mild, Moderate, Severe) */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Date the patient recovered */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date the patient died */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_details_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_details_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recovery_details" (
  "recovery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recovery record */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the confirmed case */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Date the patient recovered */,
  "recovery_location" TEXT /* Location where the patient recovered */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the follow-up visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recovery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recovery_details_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES case_details ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "death_details" (
  "death_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each death record */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the confirmed case */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date the patient died */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Cause of death */,
  "autopsy_date" TEXT /* Date of the autopsy report */,
  "autopsy_report" TEXT /* Autopsy report details */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital where the patient died */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("death_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_death_details_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES case_details ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range (e.g., 0-19, 20-39) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symptoms" (
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom */,
  "symptom_name" TEXT /* Name of the symptom */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the symptom */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symptom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_tracing" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact record */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "date_of_contact" TEXT /* Date of contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccine_types" (
  "vaccine_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccine type */,
  "vaccine_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vaccine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccine_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccine_manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccine manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccine manufacturer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vaccine manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_records" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient who received the vaccination */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date the vaccination was administered */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine (e.g., Pfizer, Moderna) */,
  "dose_number" INTEGER /* Dose number (e.g., 1, 2) */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the vaccine */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the vaccine */,
  "vaccination_location" TEXT /* Location where the vaccination was administered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare resource record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the resources are located */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "total_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of beds */,
  "icu_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of ICU beds */,
  "ventilators" INTEGER /* Total number of ventilators */,
  "available_beds" INTEGER /* Number of available beds */,
  "available_icu_beds" INTEGER /* Number of available ICU beds */,
  "available_ventilators" INTEGER /* Number of available ventilators */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the healthcare resource */,
  "utilization" REAL /* Utilization of the healthcare resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_resources_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of healthcare facility (e.g., Hospital, Clinic) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the healthcare facility */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the healthcare facility */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the healthcare facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "staff_role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., Doctor, Nurse) */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the healthcare facility where the staff member is employed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES healthcare_facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_health_interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the intervention was implemented */,
  "intervention_date" TEXT /* Date the intervention was implemented */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of intervention (e.g., Lockdown, Mask Mandate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_health_interventions_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Health Official, Data Analyst, Admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource accessed (e.g., data, patient, intervention) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the original data record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data collection */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the data is collected */,
  "tests" INTEGER /* Number of tests conducted on the date */,
  "cases" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases on the date */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases on the date */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths on the date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)
